hooks.command: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '--- Super Agent Closeout Reminder ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'If this session was change-bearing:' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  1. Suggest a commit message' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  2. Update planning/active/ plan status' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  3. Update CHANGELOG.md if release-worthy' -ForegroundColor White; Write-Host '  4. Move spec/plan to completed/ when materially finished' -ForegroundColor White"

pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if ($input -match 'git commit') { Write-Host '--- Post-Commit Reminder ---' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Run post-commit sync if runtime assets changed:' -ForegroundColor Yellow; Write-Host '  pwsh -File scripts/runtime/install.ps1 -Profile github' -ForegroundColor White }"
